exercises.safetyNoteEn: The crossed-behind stance loads the knee at an angle, so keep movement controlled and let the front knee track over the foot rather than caving inward; if you have a history of knee discomfort, keep the load moderate and consider checking with a qualified professional before progressing.

techniqueCuesZh: 坐进腿举机、后背和后脑勺贴紧靠垫，只把前脚掌（脚趾根部）放在踏板下沿，与髋同宽，脚跟悬在踏板边缘外。
先把踏板蹬起、膝盖伸到接近打直，再解开安全锁扣；膝盖保持微屈不锁死、核心收紧，让腿稳稳托住重量，只用踝关节发力。
用前脚掌把踏板向远端顶出，做到充分跖屈（提到最高），顶峰稍作停顿、不要弹震，全程脚尖朝正前方。
控制下放到踝关节充分背屈的深度拉伸，完成全幅度；提踵向上时呼气，脚跟下沉时吸气。
techniqueCuesEn: Sit deep in the leg-press machine with your back and head against the pad, then place just the balls of your feet (forefeet) on the lower edge of the platform, hip-width apart, with your heels hanging off the edge.

Press the platform up to extend your knees nearly straight, then disengage the safety stops; keep your knees soft (not locked) and your core braced so the legs hold the load while only your ankles do the work.

Drive the platform away by pushing through the balls of your feet into full plantarflexion, pausing briefly at the top instead of bouncing, and keep your toes pointed straight ahead through the squeeze.
Lower under control into a deep ankle stretch (full dorsiflexion) for a complete range of motion; exhale as you press up onto the toes and inhale as you let the heels sink.
exercises.evidenceTag: NASM Exercise Library: Leg Press Calf Raise
exercises.regressionZh: 减掉配重片、缩小底部下沉幅度，用双脚前掌缓慢可控地推蹬，降低难度。
exercises.regressionEn: Strip plates to lighten the load and limit the bottom stretch, pressing through the balls of both feet with a slow, controlled tempo.
exercises.progressionZh: 加配重片并做满全程——脚跟充分下沉拉伸、推到顶峰完全踮起并在顶端停顿——或改为单腿交替进行。
exercises.progressionEn: Add plates and use the full range—dropping the heels for a deep stretch, then driving to a full toe-point with a pause at the top—or perform one leg at a time.

techniqueCuesZh: 凳面调成中等下斜（约 15-30°），把小腿/大腿卡进踏垫和腿垫下，让身体无法下滑；先把哑铃放在大腿上，躺下时用膝盖上送的力把哑铃带到肩前。
臀部和后脑勺贴稳凳面，肩胛后缩下沉、核心收紧；下斜位血液偏向头部，节奏要稳、别长时间憋气。
起始时哑铃叠在下胸正上方，手腕保持中立、叠在肘部正上方，肘部约 45° 内收（不要外展到 90°）以保护肩关节。
控制下放到哑铃与下胸/胸骨齐平，找到拉伸感但别让两只哑铃向外散开；下放吸气，上推时略向内合拢并呼气，到顶端留一点空隙、不要让两只哑铃相撞。
techniqueCuesEn: Set the bench to a moderate decline (about 15-30 degrees) and lock your legs under the ankle/thigh pads so your body can't slide; bring the dumbbells onto your thighs and use a knee-kick to help hoist them to your shoulders as you lie back.

Plant your hips and head on the bench, retract and depress your shoulder blades, and brace your core; because blood pools toward the head on a decline, keep reps deliberate and avoid holding your breath too long.
Start with the dumbbells stacked over your lower chest, wrists straight and stacked over the elbows, and keep elbows tucked at roughly 45 degrees (not flared to 90) to protect the shoulders.

Lower under control until the dumbbells are level with your lower chest/sternum, feeling a stretch without letting them drift apart; inhale on the way down, then press up and slightly inward, exhaling, and stop just short of clashing the bells together.
exercises.regressionZh: 换更轻的哑铃、把下斜角度调缓一些（更接近平板），在舒适范围内推到底，直到底部位置和持铃都很稳为止。
exercises.regressionEn: Use lighter dumbbells and a shallower decline angle (closer to flat), pressing through a comfortable range until the bottom position and dumbbell handling feel controlled.
exercises.progressionZh: 加大重量，或在底部停顿 1–2 秒、配合 3 秒慢速离心，先把下胸张力练足再往上加重。
exercises.progressionEn: Add load, or pause 1–2 seconds at the bottom with a slow 3-second eccentric to increase lower-chest tension before progressing the weight.
exercises.safetyNoteZh: 头朝下的下斜卧推取放重哑铃比较别扭，建议用稳妥的起始方式（让人递铃或用膝顶上肩）、保持手腕在手肘正上方；若头部偏低让你感到头晕，就减小下斜角度或减轻重量。
exercises.safetyNoteEn: Getting heavy dumbbells in and out of position on a head-down decline bench is awkward, so use a controlled setup (have a spotter hand them off or use a knee-kick), keep wrists stacked over elbows, and if the head-low position makes you lightheaded, reduce the decline or load.

techniqueCuesZh: 坐在稳固凳子边缘，双手放在臀部两侧、手指朝前抓住凳沿；把臀部移出凳外，让体重落在双手上。
躯干保持直立、贴近凳子，肋骨对齐臀部、脊柱中立、核心收紧；不要靠塌腰或弓背去让肩膀下沉更多。
控制下放到肘部约 90°（上臂大致与地面平行），肘部指向正后方而非外展，然后用手掌撑起、不要借腿发力。
肘部弯曲不要超过 90°，过深的肩伸会压迫肩前部；下放时吸气、撑起时呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Sit on the edge of a sturdy bench and place your hands next to your hips, fingers pointing forward and gripping the edge; walk your hips off the bench so your weight is supported on your hands.
Keep your torso upright and close to the bench, ribs stacked over hips with a neutral spine and braced core; avoid arching or rounding your back to force the shoulders deeper.

Lower under control until your elbows reach about 90 degrees (upper arms roughly parallel to the floor), keeping elbows pointing straight back rather than flaring out, then press up through your palms, not your legs.
Don't sink below 90 degrees of elbow bend, since deep shoulder extension stresses the front of the shoulder; inhale as you lower and exhale as you press to the top.
exercises.evidenceTag: McKenzie et al., Int. J. Environ. Res. Public Health (2022) — "Bench, Bar, and Ring Dips: Do Kinematics and Muscle Activity Differ?"
exercises.regressionZh: 双脚踩地、屈膝靠近身体让腿分担一部分体重，下降到上臂大致与地面平行即可，不必沉得太低。
exercises.regressionEn: Keep your feet flat and close with knees bent so your legs share the load, and only lower until your upper arms reach about parallel.
exercises.progressionZh: 把双腿伸直架到对面的第二张凳子上，让几乎全部体重压在肱三头肌上，再在大腿上加一片杠铃片增加负荷。
exercises.progressionEn: Extend your legs straight out onto a second bench to put nearly all your bodyweight on the triceps, then add a plate on your lap for extra load.
exercises.safetyNoteZh: 由于双手撑在身体后方，肩关节会处于被拉伸的受力位置；下降幅度适中即可，不要刻意沉到最低，如果肩部曾有不适，建议缩小动作幅度，并在加大难度前咨询专业人士。
exercises.safetyNoteEn: Because your hands are placed behind your body, the shoulders are loaded in a stretched position; keep the depth moderate rather than sinking as low as possible, and if you have a history of shoulder discomfort, limit the range and check with a qualified professional before progressing.

techniqueCuesZh: 起始为高平板支撑，双手移到胸部正下方、贴近身体中线，让两手拇指与食指相触，在地面拼成一个钻石（三角）形。
收紧核心、夹紧臀部，把身体锁成从头到脚跟一条直线；底座窄、稳定性差，切勿塌腰或撅臀。
肘部向后、贴紧两侧肋骨（不要外展到 90°），让负荷集中在三头肌上，同时保护肩关节。
控制下放，让胸口轻触双手后再撑起到肘部完全伸直锁定；下放时吸气、上推时呼气。
techniqueCuesEn: Set up in a high plank with hands directly under the midline of your chest, sliding them together so your thumbs and index fingers touch to form a diamond/triangle shape on the floor.
Brace your core and squeeze your glutes to lock the body into one straight line from head to heels; do not let your hips sag or pike up, since the narrow base offers less stability.
Keep your elbows tracking back and tucked close to your ribs (not flared out to 90 degrees) so the load stays on the triceps and you protect the shoulders.
Lower your chest under control until it lightly touches your hands, then press all the way up to full elbow lock-out; inhale on the way down and exhale as you push up.
exercises.evidenceTag: Intziegianni K, Katsamis E, Michaelides M, Parpa K. Electromyographic Activation of the Pectoralis Major and Triceps Brachii Muscles During Standard, Diamond, and Wide Hand Position Push-Ups. Muscles. 2026;5(1):18.
exercises.regressionZh: 把双手撑在长凳或台面等较高的支撑面上，仍保持钻石手型，让肱三头肌承担更少的体重，更容易完成。
exercises.regressionEn: Place your hands on a raised surface like a bench or countertop, keeping the diamond shape, so less bodyweight loads the triceps.
exercises.progressionZh: 把双脚垫高在长凳上，让更多体重压到肱三头肌；或采用 3 秒慢速下放的节奏，延长肌肉张力时间来加大难度。
exercises.progressionEn: Elevate your feet on a bench to shift more weight onto the triceps, or add a slow 3-second lowering tempo for greater time under tension.
exercises.safetyNoteZh: 钻石手型比普通俯卧撑让手腕承受更大的背伸压力；如果手腕感到吃力，可把钻石手型稍微放宽、改用俯卧撑支架，并循序渐进地增加次数。
exercises.safetyNoteEn: The close hand position loads the wrists in more extension than a normal push-up; if your wrists feel strained, widen the diamond slightly, try push-up handles, and build up gradually.

techniqueCuesZh: 双手各握一只哑铃自然垂于身侧，掌心向上（旋后握），双脚与髋同宽、膝盖微屈，建立稳定底座。
双肘夹紧贴住肋侧并固定在原位，核心收紧，不要借力甩动躯干，也别让上臂前移。
掌心向上、用肱二头肌把哑铃弯举到顶点，到顶后先把手腕翻转成掌心向下（旋前握）再开始下放。
保持掌心向下、缓慢受控地下放，让前臂和肱桡肌刹住整个离心过程；上举呼气、下放吸气，到底部再转回掌心向上。
techniqueCuesEn: Stand tall holding a dumbbell in each hand at your sides with a supinated (palms-up) grip, feet hip-width apart, knees soft, for a stable base.
Pin your elbows close to your ribs and keep them fixed there; brace your core and avoid swinging the torso or letting the upper arms drift forward.
Curl up with palms facing up using your biceps, then at the top rotate your wrists to a pronated (palms-down) grip before you begin lowering.
Lower under slow control in the pronated grip so the forearms and brachioradialis brake the descent; exhale curling up, inhale on the way down, and rotate back to palms-up at the bottom.
exercises.regressionZh: 用更轻的哑铃、单臂轮流做，下放（反握）阶段只放到手腕能稳住不塌的幅度即可。
exercises.regressionEn: Use lighter dumbbells and do one arm at a time, slowing the pronated lowering phase only as far as you can control without the wrist collapsing.
exercises.progressionZh: 加大重量，或把反握下放刻意拉长到每次 4-5 秒缓慢离心，最大化前臂和肱肌张力。
exercises.progressionEn: Add load or draw out the pronated eccentric to a slow 4-5 second lowering on each rep to maximize forearm and brachialis tension.
